title: Gandalfs Exploration Pack
description: A big modpack that builds around the CREATE mod, while trying to keep everything in a steampunk/fantasy like setting!
body:
**Disclaimer:**

I do not own any of the mods featured in this modpack, nor do I guarantee that they will be compatible with each other in the future!

 ---
 
### A modpack based around the CREATE mod, while trying to keep a steampunk/fantasy like setting.

**It features a lot of different mods:**

- CREATE
> Doen't need any introduction I think! Comes with a few add-ons aswell.


- Biomes & Structures
> New biomes, dungeons, forts and much more to explore!


- Combat (PvE focused)
> New combat animations, combat roll, more weapons and spells and much more!


- Building
> A huge variety of decorations, new storage options, new building blocks, custom paintings and more!


- New Dimension?!
> The warden seems to be guarding something...


- Quality Of Life
> Fast Travel, Better Trading, Inventory Sorting, overhauled workstation, Map & Minimap, Shulkerbox Tooltips, Deepslate Cutting and much more!


- Performance
> Lithium, Sodium and Iris etc.


**and a lot more more!**
 

While this modpack can of course be used for singleplayer, a lot of it's features are way more useful when playing with friends :)

---

#### CREDITS:

- [Create Slice & Dice](https://modrinth.com/mod/slice-and-dice)

- [Wizards (RPG Series)](https://modrinth.com/mod/wizards)

- [Xaero's World Map](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-world-map)
